content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the workstream-generation bead changes on feat/9ni34-workstream-generation: ~1020-line addition to src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs (BundleValidationMode split, dependency graph analysis, summary helpers, plan.md enrichment), prompt template enhancement in template_catalog.rs, contract switch to validate_generated() in requirements_drafting/contracts.rs, and bulk test fixture updates. Verified all 46 bundle.rs unit tests pass, cargo fmt --check is clean, and clippy introduces no new warning locations vs master. Confirmed legacy bundles still flow through Compatibility-mode validate() in handoff (requirements_drafting/service.rs) and materialize_bundle (milestone_record/service.rs), so backwards compatibility is preserved. Cycle detection added to lenient validate() is intentional (asserted by validate_dependency_graph_rejects_cycles test). All .expect() panics are gated by canonicalize_bundle in their call paths. Acceptance coverage math safely handles div-by-zero via checked_div().unwrap_or(0). Identified only minor maintainability concerns (ambiguous empty-Vec return from infer_workstream_order distinguishing no-workstreams vs cycle-blocked, silent edge dropping on alias ambiguity, triple canonicalization in render path) — none rise to real bugs, correctness gaps, or safety problems per the contract's bar. No amendments proposed.

## Amendments

None.
